app.support: Your browser does not support the video tag.

confirmMessage.areYouSure: Are you sure you want to

shortcuts.attention: Attention! The keyboard shortcuts you set will not override the default browser shortcut combinations.
shortcuts.explanation: You can use the following keyboard shortcuts by pressing the SHIFT key along with the selected key combinations.

help.loadNote: You can load your saved note. A valid JSON file is required.
help.forwardRateInSeconds: The amount of time to fast-forward the video in seconds.
help.rewindRateInSeconds: The amount of time to rewind the video in seconds.
help.subtitles: If subtitles are available, toggle them on or off.
help.videoNavbarOffset: Set the position of the video control bar so that it appears below or at the bottom of the video.
help.theme: Changing the appearance of the interface.
help.saveSettings: When an entry is saved, the settings are saved along with it. When you load the note, the saved settings are automatically applied.
help.convertInput: Display the created entries in their formatted state.
help.confirmCancel: Display a confirmation message when canceling the creation or editing of an entry.
help.confirmDelete: Display a confirmation message when deleting an entry.
help.stopVideoOnNote: Pause the video automatically when the note-taking page opens.
help.startVideoOnSave: When an entry is saved, the note-taking page closes automatically and the video starts playing automatically.

thumbnail.width: Adjusting the width of the screenshots.
thumbnail.height: Adjusting the height of the screenshots.
thumbnail.forwardRateInSeconds: In the editor view, set the fast-forward duration for the screenshot in seconds.
thumbnail.rewindRateInSeconds: In the editor view, set the rewind duration for the screenshot in seconds.

shortcuts.thumbnailMoveForward: In the editor view, fast-forward the screenshot in seconds.
shortcuts.thumbnailMoveRewind: In the editor view, rewind the screenshot in seconds.
shortcuts.cancel: Cancel the creation or editing of an entry.
shortcuts.bold: Formatting the selected content of the entry in bold using Markdown syntax.
shortcuts.italic: Formatting the selected content of the entry in italic using Markdown syntax.
shortcuts.strikethrough: Formatting the selected content of the entry in strikethrough using Markdown syntax.
shortcuts.orderedList: Formatting the selected content of the entry in ordered list using Markdown syntax.
shortcuts.unorderedList: Formatting the selected content of the entry in unordered list using Markdown syntax.
